homepage.text_excerpt: Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu Michael Wheeler Welcome to the website of Michael Wheeler, your MP for Worsley & Eccles. “I’m proud to represent Worsley & Eccles. Whether you live in Astley, Cadishead, Eccles, Irlam, Mosley Common, Swinton or Worsley , I will do my best on your behalf . “Since being elected, I’ve been working hard to tackle the issues that matter most to local people. From major campaigns to the day-to-day support offered through thousands of individual cases, my priority is making sure every voice is heard and no one is left behind. “Whether you’re looking for help, want to stay updated, or just find out more about what I’m working on, you’re in the right place.” -Michael Wheeler MP Facebook X (formerly Twitter) BlueSky Latest News See more Guidance and support during the festive period Latest News 22 December 2025 Chancellor and Education Secretary visit Worsley & Eccles to launch new school-based nursery Latest News 17 September 2025 One Year as your Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Latest News 29 July 2025 Mailing List Sign Up Input your information below to be kept up to date with Michael's work across the constituency and in Parliament. pages.title: About Michael - Michael Wheeler
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
headings: h3: “Serving the communities of Worsley & Eccles”
pages.text_excerpt: About Michael - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu About Michael Michael Wheeler MP “Serving the communities of Worsley & Eccles” Michael Wheeler has represented Worsley & Eccles as a Labour MP since 2024. His path into politics began locally, shaped by a belief in fairness, community, and the importance of giving people a voice. Before entering Parliament, Michael worked as a Political Officer for the USDAW trade union, supporting retail and distribution workers across the country. He went to Clarendon Road Primary School, Wentworth High School and Eccles Sixth From before studying at Lancaster University and has always been drawn to issues that affect everyday working lives. Michael was first elected to Salford City Council in a 2011 by-election for the Eccles ward. He served as a councillor for ten years, focusing on practical, local priorities and building strong relationships with residents. Since becoming an MP, Michael has continued that approach – listening, learning, and speaking up for the people he represents. Michael is proud to call this community home and is focused on making sure Worsley & Eccles gets the attention and investment it deserves. pages.title: How Can I Help You - Michael Wheeler
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
pages.text_excerpt: How Can I Help You - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu How Can I Help You As your Member of Parliament, I receive thousands of enquiries each year from constituents across Worsley & Eccles. I’m committed to offering help and support wherever possible – whether that’s through individual casework or by addressing broader national policy concerns. I want to make our constituency a great place to work and live, so supporting local community groups, sports teams and schools is key for me. Please do get in touch if you would like to let me know about any groups in your community and the good work that they do. pages.title: Contact Me - Michael Wheeler
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
pages.text_excerpt: Contact Me - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu Contact Me If you’re a constituent and would like to get in touch – whether it’s to raise an issue, ask a question, or request support – you’re very welcome to contact me. You can email michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk or call 0161 768 4134. My team and I are here to help and will do our best to respond as quickly as possible. When getting in touch, please include your full name, address, postcode, and any relevant reference numbers. This helps us deal with your enquiry more efficiently. Please note that I can only assist with matters raised by residents of my constituency. If you’re unsure whether I’m your MP, you can check by visiting here and entering your postcode. Michael Wheeler Contact details Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW '> View on Google Maps Email: michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Jennifer Gregory on behalf of Michael Wheeler, both of Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Constituency Surgery Information - Michael Wheeler
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
pages.text_excerpt: Constituency Surgery Information - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu Constituency Surgery Information I hold regular in-person constituency surgeries to speak with residents about the issues that matter to them. These usually take place on Friday afternoons on a monthly basis at rotating locations across Swinton, Eccles, Astley, and Irlam, although the day and time can occasionally change. Appointments are 30 minutes long, and the exact locations are confirmed during the week of the appointment for security reasons. At the moment, there is a 1–2 month wait for face-to-face appointments due to high demand. However, in many cases, I am able to offer help or advice sooner. If your matter is urgent, or if you would like assistance before a meeting becomes available, a member of my Casework Team would be happy to speak with you and see how we can help. To request a surgery appointment or support, please email michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk or call 0161 768 4134. When you get in touch, please include your full name, address, and postcode, so we can confirm you live in the constituency and respond promptly. Please note that MPs can only take up cases on behalf of their own constituents. You can check whether you live in my constituency by clicking here and entering your postcode. Michael Wheeler Contact details Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW '> View on Google Maps Email: michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Jennifer Gregory on behalf of Michael Wheeler, both of Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Upcoming Events - Michael Wheeler
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
pages.text_excerpt: Upcoming Events - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu Upcoming Events Get involved with your local Labour Party Do you want to make a positive change in our community? Whether you’re a seasoned campaigner or just curious about where to start, there’s always something to get stuck into – from street stalls and canvassing to community events and campaign planning. Everyone’s welcome, and no experience is needed – just your enthusiasm and a bit of time. If you’ve got questions or want to find out more, feel free to get in touch by email at michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk . We’d love to hear from you.
